message:
feat(fcp-host): add connector artifact provenance metadata registration and query

Introduces a host-admin control plane surface for tracking the runtime
artifact currently associated with each connector. This is essential for
supply-chain auditability: operators and agents can now query provenance
evidence (source kind, URI, content hash, signature status) for any
registered connector without inspecting the filesystem.

admin_state.rs (+496 lines):
- ConnectorArtifactMetadata: persisted host-admin record with provenance,
  optional placement policy, recorded_at timestamp, and initiating actor
- ConnectorArtifactMetadataResponse: read-path response envelope
- ConnectorArtifactRegistrationRequest: write-path request with dry_run,
  signature requirements, and size limits
- ConnectorArtifactRegistrationResponse: write-path result with previous/
  current metadata, rejection details, and journal sequence
- AdminStateMutation::ArtifactMetadataUpdated: journal event variant for
  artifact registration audit trail
- ConnectorAdminState/ConnectorAdminStatus: artifact field added to both
  the persisted state and the API status projection
- connector_admin_status_from_state: propagates artifact metadata to the
  status response

fcp-host.rs (+148 lines):
- GET /rpc/connectors/{id}/artifact: read current artifact metadata
- POST /rpc/connectors/{id}/artifact: register or update artifact
  provenance with policy validation, dry-run support, and structured
  error responses
- Import reorganization for new types
- Removed unused read_env_csv helper (dead code cleanup)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
